meta.title: Making a Killing | Ep. 29: American Kleptocracy with Casey Michel
meta.description:
Casey talks to Nate and Paul about his debut book, which chronicles the rise of US financial secrecy through the colorful stories of two famous kleptocrats—and explains why the US must lead global efforts against transnational corruption.
 
American Kleptocracy is published November 23, 2021 and available to preorder now: https://us.macmillan.com/books/9781250274526/americankleptocracy

Subscribe to Making a Killing: 

Apple podcasts: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/making-a-killing/id1551344782
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/0LksXZHMcTGwMk1eV1BsLu
